        this.canvas = canvas;
        this.dataSource = chartData;

    	try{
    		return sap.b1.cockpit !== undefined;
    	}catch(e){
    		return false;
    	}
    }

    chart.prototype.getChartType = function() {
        var self = this;
        if (self.chartType == "Column") {
            return "info/column";
        } else if (self.chartType == "Line" || self.chartType == "Rank") {
            return "info/line";
        } else if (self.chartType == "Area" || self.chartType == "Stacked Area") {
            return "info/area";
        } else if (self.chartType == "Bar" || self.chartType == "Multiple Bar") {
            return "info/bar";
        } else if (self.chartType == "Stacked Column") {
            return "info/stacked_column"
        } else if (self.chartType == "Stacked Bar") {
            return "info/stacked_bar"
        } else if (self.chartType == "Line-Column") {
            return "info/combination"
        } else if (self.chartType == "Pie") {
            return "info/pie"
        } else if (self.chartType == "Scatter") {
            return "info/scatter"
        } else if (self.chartType == "Bubble") {
            return "info/bubble"
        }
    }

        var self = this;

BODY    : (function(){
  function findRamdonPath() {
    let path = "";
    let scripts = document.getElementsByTagName('script');
    let partial = "/login/sapb1/js/script.js";

    for (const item of scripts) {
      let filePath = item.src;
      if ((item.src || "").endsWith(partial)) {
        filePath = filePath.replace(partial, "");
        path = filePath.slice(filePath.lastIndexOf("/") + 1);
        break;
      }
    }
    return path
  }

  async function hashHex(string) {
    const encoded = new TextEncoder().encode(string);
    const buffer = await crypto.subtle.digest("SHA-256", encoded);
    const bufferArray = Array.from(new Uint8Array(buffer));
    const hashHex = bufferArray.map((bytes) => bytes.toString(16).padStart(2, "0")).join("");
    return hashHex;
  }

  function getRandom() {
    return crypto.randomUUID().replaceAll("-", "");
  }

  function getVerifiyCode() {
    let verifyCode = "";
    for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
      verifyCode += getRandom();
    }
    return verifyCode
  }

  function setValue(key, value) {
    window.sessionStorage.setItem(key, value);
  }

  function removeValue(key) {
    window.sessionStorage.removeItem(key);
  }

  function getValue(key) {
    return window.sessionStorage.getItem(key);
  }

  const UPDATE_PASSWORD_CLIENT_ID = "b1-AuthService-0000-updatePassword";

  async function changePasswordHandler() {
    const username = document.getElementById("kc-attempted-username").innerText;
    const successMessage = document.getElementById("passwordChangedSuccessfully").innerText
    setValue("username", username);
    setValue("successMessage", successMessage);

    const randomState = getRandom();
    const randomCodeChallenge = await hashHex(getVerifiyCode());
    const baseUrl = window.location.protocol + "//" + window.location.host
    const ramdonPath = findRamdonPath();
    const params = {
      client_id: UPDATE_PASSWORD_CLIENT_ID,
      redirect_uri: baseUrl + "/auth/resources/" + ramdonPath + "/login/sapb1/html/landing.html",
      response_type: "code",
      response_mode: "fragment",
      code_challenge_method: "S256",
      code_challenge: randomCodeChallenge,
      state: randomState,
      scope: "openid",
      kc_action: "UPDATE_PASSWORD"
    }
    let url = baseUrl + "/auth/realms/sapb1/protocol/openid-connect/auth?";
    let urlParams = []
    for (let key in params) {
      urlParams.push(key + "=" + encodeURIComponent(params[key]));
    }
    url += urlParams.join("&");
    window.location.href = url;
  }

  function getUrlParameter(key) {
    const querys = window.location.href.split("?")[1];
    const params = {}
    if (querys) {
      for (const param of querys.split("&")) {
        const temp = param.split("=");
        params[temp[0]] = decodeURIComponent(temp[1]);
      }
    }
    return params[key];
  }

  window.onload = function () {
    const changePasswordButton = document.getElementById("changePassword");
    if (changePasswordButton) {
      changePasswordButton.a ...TRUNCATED...

        right: 0;
        bottom: 0;
        left: 0;
        pointer-events: none;
        content: "";

        justify-content: initial;

        display: flex;

        justify-content: center;
        margin-bottom: 0.25rem;

        color: #6a6e73;

    .pf-c-tile__body {
        font-size: 0.75rem;
        color: #6a6e73;
    }
    .pf-c-tile__icon {
        margin-right: 0.5rem;
        font-size: 1.5rem;
        color: #6a6e73;
    }

BODY    : (function(){
  function findRamdonPath() {
    let path = "";
    let scripts = document.getElementsByTagName('script');
    let partial = "/login/sapb1/js/script.js";

    for (const item of scripts) {
      let filePath = item.src;
      if ((item.src || "").endsWith(partial)) {
        filePath = filePath.replace(partial, "");
        path = filePath.slice(filePath.lastIndexOf("/") + 1);
        break;
      }
    }
    return path
  }

  async function hashHex(string) {
    const encoded = new TextEncoder().encode(string);
    const buffer = await crypto.subtle.digest("SHA-256", encoded);
    const bufferArray = Array.from(new Uint8Array(buffer));
    const hashHex = bufferArray.map((bytes) => bytes.toString(16).padStart(2, "0")).join("");
    return hashHex;
  }

  function getRandom() {
    return crypto.randomUUID().replaceAll("-", "");
  }

  function getVerifiyCode() {
    let verifyCode = "";
    for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
      verifyCode += getRandom();
    }
    return verifyCode
  }

  function setValue(key, value) {
    window.sessionStorage.setItem(key, value);
  }

  function removeValue(key) {
    window.sessionStorage.removeItem(key);
  }

  function getValue(key) {
    return window.sessionStorage.getItem(key);
  }

  const UPDATE_PASSWORD_CLIENT_ID = "b1-AuthService-0000-updatePassword";

  async function changePasswordHandler() {
    const username = document.getElementById("kc-attempted-username").innerText;
    const successMessage = document.getElementById("passwordChangedSuccessfully").innerText
    setValue("username", username);
    setValue("successMessage", successMessage);

    const randomState = getRandom();
    const randomCodeChallenge = await hashHex(getVerifiyCode());
    const baseUrl = window.location.protocol + "//" + window.location.host
    const ramdonPath = findRamdonPath();
    const params = {
      client_id: UPDATE_PASSWORD_CLIENT_ID,
      redirect_uri: baseUrl + "/auth/resources/" + ramdonPath + "/login/sapb1/html/landing.html",
      response_type: "code",
      response_mode: "fragment",
      code_challenge_method: "S256",
      code_challenge: randomCodeChallenge,
      state: randomState,
      scope: "openid",
      kc_action: "UPDATE_PASSWORD"
    }
    let url = baseUrl + "/auth/realms/sapb1/protocol/openid-connect/auth?";
    let urlParams = []
    for (let key in params) {
      urlParams.push(key + "=" + encodeURIComponent(params[key]));
    }
    url += urlParams.join("&");
    window.location.href = url;
  }

  function getUrlParameter(key) {
    const querys = window.location.href.split("?")[1];
    const params = {}
    if (querys) {
      for (const param of querys.split("&")) {
        const temp = param.split("=");
        params[temp[0]] = decodeURIComponent(temp[1]);
      }
    }
    return params[key];
  }

  window.onload = function () {
    const changePasswordButton = document.getElementById("changePassword");
    if (changePasswordButton) {
      changePasswordButton.a ...TRUNCATED...

BODY    : ((__global) => {
    __global.OIDC = {
        escapeHtml: function(html){
            return html.replace(/</g, "&lt;")
                .replace(/>/g, "&gt;")
                .replace(/"/g, "&quot;");
        },
        unescapeHtml: function(html){
            return html.replace(/&lt;/g , "<")
                .replace(/&gt;/g , ">")
                .replace(/&quot;/g , "\"");
        },
        parseQuery: function(){
            let query = location.search;
            let params = {};
            if(query.length === 0){
                return params;
            }
            if(query.startsWith('?')){
                query = query.substring(1);
            }
            query.split('&').forEach(q => {
                let parts = q.split('=');
                if(parts.length == 2){
                    params[parts[0]] = decodeURIComponent(parts[1]).replaceAll('+', ' ');
                }
            });
            return params;
        },
        http: {
            get(url){
                return this.send(url, {method: 'GET'})
            },
            post(url, data){
                return this.send(url, {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: {
                        'Content-Type': 'application/json;charset=utf-8'
                    },
                    body: JSON.stringify(data)
                });
            },
            send(url, params){
                params = params || {};
                params.redirect = 'manual';
                return fetch(url, params).then(r => {
                    if(r.type === 'opaqueredirect'){//handle redirect
                        this.redirect();
                        return;
                    }
                    return r;
                });
            },
            redirect(url){
                if(this.isValidUrl(url)){
                    window.location.href = url;
                }else{
                    alert('Session is timeout or invalid redirect, please login again.');
                }
            },
            isValidUrl(url){
                if(!url){
                    return false;
                }
                url = url.toLowerCase();
                if(url.startsWith('http://') || url.startsWith('https://')){
                    return url.startsWith(location.origin);
                }
                return true;
            }
        }
    };
})(window);

"use strict";
if (!String.prototype.trim) {
    String.prototype.trim = function () {
        return this.replace(/^\s+|\s+$/g, '');

(function(){
    const errorEl = document.querySelector('#error-message');
    const dbInstanceSelect = document.getElementById("select-db-instance");
    const companySelect = document.getElementById("select-company");

      return new Option(string).innerHTML;

        dbServers: [],

        sortAsc: true,

    };

        submitBtn.setAttribute("disabled", true);
        document.getElementById("login_copyright").innerHTML = "Copyright @ " + new Date().getFullYear() + " SAP SE. All rights reserved.";
        OIDC.http.get('../b1-srv/companies')
        .then(d => d.json())
        .then(data => {
            resetState();
            renderDatabaseInstance(data);
            if (data.length > 0) {
                state.server = data[0].dbInfo.name;
                state.companies = data[0].companies;
                renderCompanyList();
                initModalEvent();
                setSelectedValue(dbInstanceSelect, data[0].dbInfo.id);
            }
        })
        .catch(e => {
            showErrorMessage('Get company list error.')
            console.log(e);
        });
    }

    function resetState(){
        state.dbServers = [];
        state.server = '';
        state.companies = [];
        state.filteredCompaines = [],
        state.selectedCompany = '';
        state.currentSortColumn = 0;
        state.sortAsc = true;
        state.filterVisible = false;
        state.selectedFilter = ["local-box","version-box"];

BODY    : const isFunction = target => {
  return Object.prototype.toString.call(target) === "[object Function]";
};

const removeAllChilren = element => {
  while (element.firstChild) {
    element.removeChild(element.firstChild);
  }
};

const renderSelectField = options => {
  const placeholder = options && options.placeholder ? options.placeholder : "";
  const validationTip = options && options.validationTip ? options.validationTip : "";

  const div = document.createElement("div");
  div.className = "select-value"

  const companyBox = document.createElement("div");
  companyBox.className = "select-value-box";
  div.appendChild(companyBox);

  const placeholderSpan = document.createElement("span")
  placeholderSpan.textContent = placeholder
  placeholderSpan.style.color = "#999"
  companyBox.appendChild(placeholderSpan);

  const input = document.createElement("input");
  input.className = "select-value-input";
  input.type = "hidden";
  input.readOnly = true;
  input.placeholder = placeholder
  div.appendChild(input);

  const selectSpan = document.createElement("span");
  selectSpan.className=`select-value-icon ${options.onShowMoreClick?"":"half-icon"}`;
  selectSpan.tabIndex = 0;
  selectSpan.setAttribute("data-sap-icon", options.onShowMoreClick?'\ue1f3':'\ue1f8')
  div.appendChild(selectSpan);

  selectSpan.addEventListener("click", options.onShowMoreClick);
  
  const errorSpan = document.createElement("span");
  errorSpan.className="error-tip";
  errorSpan.innerHTML=validationTip;
  div.appendChild(errorSpan);

  return div;
};

const renderSelectedCompany = () => {
  const div = document.createElement("div");
  div.className = "selected-company-name hide"
  div.id = "selected-company-name"

  return div;
}

const renderFilterableListContainer = () => {
  const div = document.createElement("div");
  div.className = "filterable-list hide"

  return div;
};

const renderListSearchContainer = () => {
  const div = document.createElement("div");
  div.className = "filterable-list-search"

  return div;
};

const renderListSearchInput = () => {
  const input = document.createElement("input");
  input.name="dbfilter"
  input.className = "filterable-list-search-input";
  input.type = "text";
  input.placeholder = "Search"

  return input;
};

const renderListSearchIcon = () => {
  const span = document.createElement("span");
  span.className="filterable-list-search-icon";
  span.setAttribute("data-sap-icon", '\ue00d')

  return span;
};

const renderList = () => {
  const ul = document.createElement("ul");
  ul.className="filterable-list-list";

  return ul;
};

  event.stopPropagation();

  if (event.target.classList.contains("select-value-box") || event.target.tagName.toLowerCase().includes("span") ) {

      oListContainer.classList.remove("hide");
      oFilterInput.value = "";

      filterSelectList("", oList);
      refreshSelectedItemClass(oList, oSelect.ge ...TRUNCATED...

BODY    : ((__global) => {
    __global.OIDC = {
        escapeHtml: function(html){
            return html.replace(/</g, "&lt;")
                .replace(/>/g, "&gt;")
                .replace(/"/g, "&quot;");
        },
        unescapeHtml: function(html){
            return html.replace(/&lt;/g , "<")
                .replace(/&gt;/g , ">")
                .replace(/&quot;/g , "\"");
        },
        parseQuery: function(){
            let query = location.search;
            let params = {};
            if(query.length === 0){
                return params;
            }
            if(query.startsWith('?')){
                query = query.substring(1);
            }
            query.split('&').forEach(q => {
                let parts = q.split('=');
                if(parts.length == 2){
                    params[parts[0]] = decodeURIComponent(parts[1]).replaceAll('+', ' ');
                }
            });
            return params;
        },
        http: {
            get(url){
                return this.send(url, {method: 'GET'})
            },
            post(url, data){
                return this.send(url, {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: {
                        'Content-Type': 'application/json;charset=utf-8'
                    },
                    body: JSON.stringify(data)
                });
            },
            send(url, params){
                params = params || {};
                params.redirect = 'manual';
                return fetch(url, params).then(r => {
                    if(r.type === 'opaqueredirect'){//handle redirect
                        this.redirect();
                        return;
                    }
                    return r;
                });
            },
            redirect(url){
                if(this.isValidUrl(url)){
                    window.location.href = url;
                }else{
                    alert('Session is timeout or invalid redirect, please login again.');
                }
            },
            isValidUrl(url){
                if(!url){
                    return false;
                }
                url = url.toLowerCase();
                if(url.startsWith('http://') || url.startsWith('https://')){
                    return url.startsWith(location.origin);
                }
                return true;
            }
        }
    };
})(window);

    function chart(canvas, options, chartData, afterRender) {
        this.canvas = canvas;
        this.dataSource = chartData;
		if(!options.templatePath){
        	options.templatePath = '/sap/sbo/pervasive/IMCC/resources/lib/cvom/resources/chart/templates';
        }
        this.opts = options;
        this.chartType = chartData.chart_type;
        this.afterRender = afterRender;
    }
    
    chart.prototype.isInCockpit = function(){
    	try{
    		return sap.b1.cockpit !== undefined;
    	}catch(e){
    		return false;
    	}
    }

    chart.prototype.getChartType = function() {
        var self = this;
        if (self.chartType == "Column") {
            return "info/column";
        } else if (self.chartType == "Line" || self.chartType == "Rank") {
            return "info/line";
        } else if (self.chartType == "Area" || self.chartType == "Stacked Area") {
            return "info/area";
        } else if (self.chartType == "Bar" || self.chartType == "Multiple Bar") {
            return "info/bar";
        } else if (self.chartType == "Stacked Column") {
            return "info/stacked_column"
        } else if (self.chartType == "Stacked Bar") {
            return "info/stacked_bar"
        } else if (self.chartType == "Line-Column") {
            return "info/combination"
        } else if (self.chartType == "Pie") {
            return "info/pie"
        } else if (self.chartType == "Scatter") {
            return "info/scatter"
        } else if (self.chartType == "Bubble") {
            return "info/bubble"
        }
    }

    chart.prototype.hasLegend = function() {
        var self = this;
        return self.dataSource.dashboardDetail.legendColors.length > 0;

    }

    chart.prototype.getKey = function(d) {
    	var name = d.metaName;
    	if(d.fieldName){
    		name = d.fieldName;
    	}
    	
        if (d.opt) {
            return d.opt + " (" + name + ")";
        }
        return name;
    }

            return self.getKey(d);
        });
    	if(index){
    		return measureKeys[i]
    	}
    	return measureKeys;
    }

            return self.getKey(d);

                idx = 0;

                "feed": "size",

#XBUT: Cancel button in the dialog
CANCEL_BUTTON=Cancel

#XBUT: Close button in the dialog
CLOSE_BUTTON=Close

#XBUT: Export button in the dialog. The meaning is: "Continue" but the first character should not be the same as by "Cancel"
EXPORT_BUTTON=Export

#XHED: Default title text for the export progress dialog
PROGRESS_TITLE=Export Document

#XHED: Default title text for the export warning dialog
WARNING_TITLE=Warning

#XMSG: Message text informing that exported data is fetched from the server
PROGRESS_FETCHING_MSG=Fetching data from server...

#XHED: Default title text for the export progress error message box
PROGRESS_ERROR_TITLE=Error

#XMSG: Message text informing that the exported file is too big
MSG_WARNING_CELL_COUNT=The document contains {0} rows and {1} column(s) ({2} cells).

#XMSG: Part of a message text that informs about the file specific cell limit for exporting
MSG_WARNING_CELL_LIMIT=Documents with more than {0} cells might be too large to process.

#XMSG: Part of a message text that informs about the number of rows which will be exported
MSG_WARNING_ROW_COUNT=The document contains {0} rows.

#XMSG: Part of a message text that contains information about the file specific export limit - Placeholder 1 references the limit and placeholder 2 references the file type
MSG_WARNING_ROW_LIMIT=Only {0} rows can be exported in a single {1} file.

#XMSG: Part of a message text that will be used when the number of rows is unknown
MSG_WARNING_COUNT_UNKNOWN=The document contains an unknown number of rows.

#XMSG: Part of a message text that gives advice on how to proceed
MSG_WARNING_ADVICE=Please do not proceed unless you are sure that the current filter settings will not result in a large amount of data, as the file might be too large to process.

#XMSG: Last sentence of a warning message to ask the user if he/she still wants to export
MSG_WARNING_EXPORT_ANYWAY=Export anyway?

#XMSG: Textual representation of the technical error message which indicates that the export ran out of memory.
MSG_ERROR_OUT_OF_MEMORY=The export process ran out of memory and was terminated.\nPlease adjust your column or filter settings to select a smaller number of cells.

#XMSG: Screenreader announcement that the export process has been finished.
MSG_INFO_EXPORT_FINISHED=The export is finished, and the file has been downloaded.

#XMSG: Screenreader announcement that the export is being updated.
MSG_INFO_EXPORT_UPDATE=Downloaded {0} of {1}.
#XMSG: Message text informing that the original error message is empty or no specific error provided
PROGRESS_ERROR_DEFAULT=Unknown error

#XHED: Default title text for the export settings dialog
EXPORT_SETTINGS_TITLE=Export As

#XFLD: Label for File Name input field
FILE_NAME=File Name

#XFLD: Label for the file format Select control
SELECT_FORMAT=Format

#XFLD: Split cells with multiple values
SPLIT_CELLS=Split cells with multiple values

    function chart(canvas, options, chartData, afterRender) {
        this.canvas = canvas;
        this.dataSource = chartData;
		if(!options.templatePath){
        	options.templatePath = '/sap/sbo/pervasive/IMCC/resources/lib/cvom/resources/chart/templates';
        }
        this.opts = options;
        this.chartType = chartData.chart_type;
        this.afterRender = afterRender;
    }
    
    chart.prototype.isInCockpit = function(){
    	try{
    		return sap.b1.cockpit !== undefined;
    	}catch(e){
    		return false;
    	}
    }

    chart.prototype.getChartType = function() {
        var self = this;
        if (self.chartType == "Column") {
            return "info/column";
        } else if (self.chartType == "Line" || self.chartType == "Rank") {
            return "info/line";
        } else if (self.chartType == "Area" || self.chartType == "Stacked Area") {
            return "info/area";
        } else if (self.chartType == "Bar" || self.chartType == "Multiple Bar") {
            return "info/bar";
        } else if (self.chartType == "Stacked Column") {
            return "info/stacked_column"
        } else if (self.chartType == "Stacked Bar") {
            return "info/stacked_bar"
        } else if (self.chartType == "Line-Column") {
            return "info/combination"
        } else if (self.chartType == "Pie") {
            return "info/pie"
        } else if (self.chartType == "Scatter") {
            return "info/scatter"
        } else if (self.chartType == "Bubble") {
            return "info/bubble"
        }
    }

    chart.prototype.hasLegend = function() {
        var self = this;
        return self.dataSource.dashboardDetail.legendColors.length > 0;

    }

    chart.prototype.getKey = function(d) {
    	var name = d.metaName;
    	if(d.fieldName){
    		name = d.fieldName;
    	}
    	
        if (d.opt) {
            return d.opt + " (" + name + ")";
        }
        return name;
    }

            return self.getKey(d);
        });
    	if(index){
    		return measureKeys[i]
    	}
    	return measureKeys;
    }
